description: Perform a Time-of-Use (TOU) energy cost analysis on the hourly smart meter data in /home/ga/Documents/hourly_load_data.xlsx. On the 'MeterData' sheet, determine the Month, Hour, Weekday, Period, and Cost for each record. 'Peak' periods are defined as weekdays (Monday-Friday) from 14:00 to 19:59 inclusive ($0.28/kWh), while all other times are 'Off-Peak' ($0.11/kWh). Generate a summary table on a new sheet named 'Monthly_Summary' with the following columns: Month (1-12), Total_Usage_kWh (sum), Peak_Demand_kW (maximum hourly usage), and Total_Cost (sum, formatted as currency). Save the updated spreadsheet to /home/ga/Documents/hourly_load_data.xlsx.
